problem_solved: Health plans struggle to connect members to evidence-based social and community programs that address chronic conditions and SDOH
solution_description: Platform connecting health plans to a curated network of social determinants and community-based programs. Matches members to appropriate interventions including food programs, stress management, tobacco cessation, and chronic disease support. Provides single point of integration for health plans to access community programs
traction_signals: Single integration point for multiple SDOH services
Food, stress, tobacco cessation programs available
notes: SDOH marketplace connecting payers to community programs. Strong fit for Varden - intermediary between payers and social services. Similar model to Findhelp/Unite Us but focus on program matching vs. general referrals. High Varden fit for SDOH infrastructure
